summary.seed_verdict_rule: A seed counts as accepted or rejected only after every generated reviewer row for that seed is completed and valid.
summary.next_step: Fill review packets and run summarize-open-set-seed-review.

results.title: AG News Business #0
raw_candidates: Fears for T N pension after talks Unions representing workers at Turner Newall say they are 'disappointed' after talks with stricken parent firm Federal Mogul.
Pension funds and their representatives have expressed concerns about the future financial stability of T N due to the ongoing negotiations with Federal Mogul.
The unions claim that the talks were not productive or satisfactory, leading to a sense of disappointment among the employees.
Federal Mogul's bankruptcy has led to uncertainty regarding the company's ability to continue providing benefits to its workforce, including pensions.
The situation highlights the potential risks associated with outsourcing production to foreign companies, as it can lead to job losses and financial instability for local labor unions.
